author: @danhunt5016
text: Did you finish this? It was so close to being done, just the earthing, belt and attach the brush's. I would love to see it in action.

author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: You have to earth the bottom set of brushes. This allows a seperation of the charges to occure. But being a HV device that earth should really be seperate from the house earth as 500,000 volt will play avoc with your house wiring. So essentially fit an earthing block to the base plate, run a thick guage wire from the bottom set of brushes to the block then pound a 2m copper rod into the gorund outside and attach another wire to that - then when you want to run the generator attach to the block
